name: /agent-verify exits zero when the verifier emits verdict: agree (commit may proceed per F-3)
command:
printf 'diff stub
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "verdict: agree"
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>err.txt && echo agree 1>&2
